Our Story

Crafting Timeless
Spaces Since 2018

Design Dunes is a premium interior design studio born from a singular belief: that every space has the potential to be extraordinary. Founded in Hyderabad, we have grown into one of South India’s most sought-after design studios, with a portfolio spanning intimate residences, grand villas, and landmark commercial spaces.

We are not merely decorators — we are storytellers, spatial poets, and meticulous craftsmen. Our team of 20+ designers, architects, and project managers bring together decades of collective experience and an unwavering commitment to quality that transcends trends.

From the first sketch to the final reveal, every decision is driven by your vision, refined by our expertise, and executed to perfection. Design Dunes is where aspirations become architecture, and rooms become legacies.

◈

Bespoke Design

Every project is tailor-made. No templates, no shortcuts — only spaces crafted to your unique lifestyle.

◈

Premium Materials

We source only the finest — Italian marble, solid wood, hand-woven textiles, and artisan hardware from across the globe.

◈

End-to-End Service

From concept to handover, we manage every detail so you can focus entirely on the joy of your new space.

70+ Projects
Completed

What We Create

Our Signature
Collections

01 · Living Spaces

Curated Living Rooms

Statement furniture, art curation, and layered lighting that transforms your primary gathering space into theatre.

02 · Kitchens

Bespoke Kitchens

Italian lacquer, brass hardware, and smart layouts engineered for the discerning cook and the elegant host.

03 · Bedrooms

Master Sanctuaries

Serene, deeply layered bedroom retreats with custom joinery, bespoke upholstery, and calm sophistication.

Years of Mastery

How We Work

Our Four-Step
Process

01

Discovery

A deep conversation about your lifestyle, aspirations, family, and spatial requirements — before a single line is drawn.

02

Concept Design

Mood boards, 3D renders, and curated material palettes that bring your vision into breathtaking clarity.

03

Craftsmanship

Skilled artisans, premium materials, and rigorous quality control at every stage of execution.

04

Handover

A complete, fully styled space — every detail dressed, every system tested, every moment considered.

“

Design Dunes transformed our villa beyond imagination. The attention to detail, the quality of materials, and the seamless process made this the finest investment we’ve ever made in our home.

— Priya & Arjun Reddy, Vijayawada Villa Project

“

From the first consultation to the final reveal, every step was seamless. Our living room now feels like a five-star suite. We couldn’t be happier with the result.

— Lakshmi & Venkat Rao, Visakhapatnam Apartment

“

The team understood our vision perfectly — even things we couldn’t articulate ourselves. The modular kitchen they designed is both beautiful and incredibly functional.

— Suresh Naidu, Guntur Penthouse

“

Exceptional craftsmanship and a team that truly listens. Our home in Tirupati has become the talk of the neighbourhood. Design Dunes exceeded every expectation we had.

— Srinivas & Padma Varma, Tirupati Residence

“

We handed over the keys and came back to a palace. The interior for our new home in Nellore is absolutely stunning. Every corner has been thought through with such care.

— Ravi & Anuradha Chowdary, Nellore Villa
